title: Gladius Rages at Violet's Betrayal
description: Pages 6–10 focus on gladius rages at violet's betrayal, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Violet, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sanji and Violet share information, Zoro and Kin'emon try to reach Luffy, and the Donquixote Family reacts to Violet's betrayal.

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: through my "clairvoyance," I can send out my "sight" as if it were a bird in a 4000 kilometer radius.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As long as I'm here, I can see everything that's going on in this country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So you shouldn' t worry about me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's no way I'll be caught by my pursuers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...so you're going to keep to the land!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No, don't worry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: At this point, I'll....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What is it!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is terrible!! Your ship was just struck by lightning!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Light- Ning!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hmm? If it's lightning...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So, what do we do with this?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Bone-kich!! I also gave her a blow, that I did!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ehhh! You've got quite an arm.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We can't just throw her over- board.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: She's an ability user, yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: is... is that so. I do have quite an arm...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: and I have no desire to see her panties!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: WH!! who... ...are you calling Miss Universe!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You may be interested

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Anyway, right now we need to hurry over to Tora-man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: But how did Caesar's exchange turn out?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: That's right. Because Doflamingo quit the ski- Chibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: We show- LD Return Caesar as promised...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: A minimum percentage

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Y....you people... you don't know anything do you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: How AUs- Picious... Ohbobo...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Young Master... He never took any of the negro- Tiations with you brats seri-ously....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: And young master surely never quit the shichibukal.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: What on earth do you mean!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Ehh!! I don't under- stand, that I don't!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: That hurts you brat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: WaH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: You've all fallen right into the trap!!

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: By now, Violet will have revealed everything, and all your friends...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Will have been captured!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Ehhh!!?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Green Bit: Law vs. Doflamingo and Admiral Fujitora.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: ...So then, you were...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: A tenryu- Bito, Dofla- Mingo...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Yes. "Were" is correct.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: But no longer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: What is "Blood"....!? What is "Destiny"....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: There are few who've carved as checkered and hapless a life as myself... Fuffuffu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: The second thing I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I would have loved to tell you the story of my life up until I met you, perhaps over some drinks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: But there's no time for anything like that right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: I have to do something abo-ut the strawhat crew members on dressrossa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: There are far too many out there who, in the past, under- estimated this crew and were burned for it.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: What's Wrong, Fujitora?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: I thought I heard a peal of thunder... out at sea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: The sky's perfectly clear...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: THUNDER...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Even though my eyes are closed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: I should be able to sense at least the movement of clouds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: ...Heh heh I suppose I'm getting old...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: ....!! weather con- tool's gotta be nami-ya...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: So the ship's come.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: 01, JOKER!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: If you've already stolen it back, then give it here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: Quickly !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: My heart, my heart!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: I don't remember ever saying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: That that was Caesar's heart....!!

summary: Gladius Rages at Violet's Betrayal focuses on Violet, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as sanji and Violet share information, Zoro and Kin'emon try to reach Luffy, and the Donquixote Family reacts to Violet's betrayal.
